CustomField.description: JSON configuration for masking strategy. Examples: {"visibleCharacters": 4, "position": "end"} for PARTIAL, {"algorithm": "SHA-256", "truncateLength": 32} for HASH, {"replacement": "***REDACTED***"} for REGEX_PATTERN.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: JSON options by strategy: PARTIAL: {"visibleChars": 4, "position": "end"|"start"}. EMAIL: {"showLocalChars": 1, "showDomain": true}. FULL/REDACT: leave empty.
CustomField.label: Masking Options (JSON)
